strengths: The opening immediately continues chapter 13's residue / material / filter-window hook and avoids recap.
Lu Chenzhou's agency is concrete: he checks the retreat line first, sets a three-minute route, controls lights, windows, rope hooks, and abandonment conditions.
Lin Zhixia's material judgment is useful in real time. She distinguishes outer contamination, intact seals, usable frame parts, contaminated harness, and sample-vs-material boundaries.
The chapter pays off the upgrade promise without breaking constraints: material conditions advance, but the Simple Medical Bay remains uninstalled and inactive.
Resource pressure lands clearly through shrinking filter time, rear seal stress, tool / bag contamination, and external isolation instead of clean acquisition.
The ending hook is sharp and operational: a false Lu Chenzhou command invites people to board after a remote door unlock, forcing chapter 15 into command-mimicry and crowd pressure.

issues.evidence: The chapter deliberately focuses on material retrieval mechanics rather than opening a new lore layer.
issues.suggested_fix: This matches the unit map. Chapter 15 should add external action pressure through fog dogs and survivor risk-transfer.

issues.evidence: The middle has several retrieval beats in sequence: film, frame, harness, then bags. It is clear but procedural.
issues.suggested_fix: If revising, keep the retrieval order but tighten repeated system confirmations or repeated '记账' logic.

revision_priorities: Preserve the immediate material-signal / residue / 14-minute opening.
Preserve the three-minute route and clear abandonment conditions.
Preserve Lin Zhixia's refusal to take the contaminated harness.
Do not add module activation, main-building entry, or father-line hard evidence.
Preserve the false Lu Chenzhou '门开了，上车' ending.
human_approval_needed: Whether the material retrieval sequence feels exciting enough without a full fight.
Whether abandoning the sterile power interface is satisfying as cost rather than frustrating.
Whether the final false-command hook is strong enough to launch chapter 15.
